rationale: Prioritize physical compliance checking tools to prevent Agentic Sycophancy before introducing write/mutation capabilities. Directly addresses M1 architecture drift incident.

candidate_tools.name: validate_artifact_schema
candidate_tools.description: Validates a given JSON artifact against its core schema definition.

candidate_tools.name: verify_execution_compliance
candidate_tools.description: Compares physical git diff against the allowed_files declared in an execution contract to detect uncontracted modifications.

execution_constraints: Do not remove or alter existing legacy Python scripts in this phase.
No workflow state mutation tools (write operations) are permitted in M2 to maintain security.
Must implement child_process strictly for git diff and fs/promises for schema reading.
prerequisites_for_drafting_contract: Reviewer approval of this reconnaissance direction.
